test-method.name: TC_01_04_verifyLoginPageUI
test-method.description: TC_01_04 - Verify login page UI elements are displayed correctly

exception.message: Brand pill should show 'Sponsorship Hub' expected [Sponsorship Hub] but found [SPONSORSHIP HUB]

test-method.name: TC_01_05_loginWithNonExistentEmail
test-method.description: TC_01_05 - Login with non-existent email shows error message
